---
title: Trial Specifications Document 
subtitle: | 
  North Pacific Swordfish MSE 
author: 
  - name: Adrian Hordyk
    affiliation: Blue Matter Science Ltd
  - name: "Rebecca Scott"
    affiliation: The Ocean Foundation
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::robobook:
    highlight: kate
    toc_depth: 2
    use_bookdown: yes
urlcolor: blue
always_allow_html: true
---

# Introduction

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
```

This document describes the technical details of the management strategy evaluation (MSE) framework being developed for the North Pacific Swordfish (NPSWO) fishery.

This is a living document and will be continually updated as the project progresses.
